content: This is a session summary that should be skipped by the parser

message.content: System initialization message that should be skipped by parser
This user message has isMeta flag and should be skipped by the parser
This assistant message has isMeta flag and should be skipped
This is the only valid user message that should be parsed from this file with skip types present

And this is the only valid assistant response that should be parsed. It needs to be long enough to pass the sixty-four character minimum chunk size filter that the session parser applies to all output chunks.
